nodes.label: graphify command dispatch — every non-install subcommand.  Extracted verbatim fr
Print per-stage wall-clock timings to stderr when --timing is set (#1490).
Reject oversized graph files before parsing (CLI exit-on-fail flavor).      Dele
Shell-agnostic PreToolUse guard (#522).      Reads the tool-call JSON from stdin
Clone a GitHub repo to a local cache dir and return the path.      Clones into ~
